title: v0.2-α — LLM inference integration with defense-in-depth
phase: ZCS-6 Phase 5 (re-application for v0.2 build cycle)

author.name: A. Khaalis Wooden, Sr.
author.academic: MBA; MSIT Candidate, Southern New Hampshire University

summary: v0.2-α replaces the v0.1.1 rule-based inference stub in the nuanced decision band with a real LLM adapter producing teacher-forced log-probabilities over the eight DECISION_OPTIONS. Two adapter implementations ship: OllamaMistralAdapter (canonical production path for Mistral-7B-Instruct via Ollama, honoring MVCI zero-budget constraint) and TransformersHFAdapter (sandbox demonstration with Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct). Defense-in-depth refactor: hard safety floors and physical-validity checks remain deterministic; LLM is consulted only when no floor fires. Verified via 8 new integration tests; all 43 prior tests still pass (51/51 total). HF-12 architecturally upgraded — threshold-based autonomy routing now load-bearing rather than constant. Production-validated HF-12 numbers require Mistral-7B + calibration audit (carry to v0.2-β).

key_changes.defense_in_depth: civium/inference.py — Tier 1 floors (deterministic) + Tier 2 LLM nuanced band
key_changes.chain_provenance: INFERENCE_RECOMMENDATION entries now include real model_hash, prompt_hash, logprob_summary (per-option dict), selected_logprob, source
key_changes.interface_compatibility: process_event accepts optional llm_adapter; when None, falls back to v0.1.1 rule-based path (no regression)

hf12_remeasurement.decision_class_concentration: all 6 → THERMAL_ADJUST_NOMINAL (0.5B model too weak for nuanced classification; expected sandbox artifact)
hf12_remeasurement.architectural_finding: Threshold is load-bearing; gate routing is now a function of LLM posterior. Binary cut at 0.5 is sandbox-model artifact; production Mistral-7B with wider calibration would discriminate continuously.

honest_residuals_v02_beta: Mistral-7B inference (replacing sandbox 0.5B) — Ollama adapter is ready; production deployment work
Calibration audit on labeled PLSS scenario library — empirical confidence-vs-accuracy validation
ACI live-pipeline integration — currently measurement-only; wire as runtime gate on LLM confidence
Scenario library expansion to ≥1000 labeled nuanced-band states
Lean 4 / Coq machine-checkable proofs of Mercury (HF-10 full closure) — NEXT WORK ITEM
OpenTimestamps anchor + ground replication (O-3 full closure)
Hardware silicon for bus isolation (HF-10 full)
next_work_item: v0.2-β — Lean 4 proofs of Mercury subleq emulator + O2 control loop
